subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and thy fervent entreaty and supplication caused me to turn toward the threshold of the Ancient Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید و تضرع شدید و ابتهال عظیم سبب شد که بدرگاه رب قدیم
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
